## Promotion Insights

### Color Analysis
*Statistics computed across 774 images*

| Color | Mean |
|-------|------|
| Dark Blue | 27.2% |
| Dark Green | 23.0% |
| Light Blue | 22.3% |
| Cyan | 21.4% |
| Black | 20.6% |
| Royal Blue | 19.3% |
| Gray | 17.3% |
| Dark Brown | 15.0% |

### Tone Distribution

| Tone | Mean |
|------|------|
| Warm | 1.9% |
| Neutral | 25.8% |
| Cool | 72.3% |
